items.title: Surprised with how good the comments on github gists are. A lot more helpful, insightful, const…
items.content: Surprised with how good the comments on github gists are. A lot more helpful, insightful, constructive, a lot less AI... Is it the user community? The markdown format? The (lack of) incentives? Suddenly feeling like I should gist more. @github consider competing with X (?)

items.title: What are some good examples of open source winning vs. proprietary tech? In mobile for example,…
items.content: What are some good examples of open source winning vs. proprietary tech? In mobile for example, Android has the most market share but iOS still captures the majority of profits. Seems like both can win?

items.title: woke up and my mentions are full of these Both me and @davemorin tried to talk sense into Anthr…
items.content: woke up and my mentions are full of these Both me and @davemorin tried to talk sense into Anthropic, best we managed was delaying this for a week. Funny how timings match up, first they copy some popular features into their closed harness, then they lock out open source. https://t.co/Mgmv6YmW2B

items.title: I keep hitting quota limits from GitHub's API. This hasn't been designed with agents in mind.
